metadata.title: Save as Local Images
metadata.description: Save as Local Images Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display notices showing how many images were found, downloaded, and any errors.
ast.target: 显示通知，说明找到了多少张图片、下载了多少张以及任何错误。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 将所有远程图片保存到本地

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No remote images found in this note.
ast.target: 此笔记中未找到远程图片。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Markdown notes found in this folder.
ast.target: 此文件夹中未找到 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将所有远程图片保存到本地

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save as Local Images finds all remote/external images in the current note and downloads them into your vault's attachment folder. After downloading, all URLs are rewritten to point to the local copies.
ast.target: “保存为本地图片”功能会查找当前笔记中的所有远程/外部图片，并将它们下载到您的保险库附件文件夹中。下载完成后，所有 URL 都将被重写以指向本地副本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a note that contains remote images
ast.target: 打开一个包含远程图片的笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run the "save all remote images locally" command from the palette
ast.target: 从命令面板运行“将所有远程图片保存到本地”命令

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin downloads each image and saves it under your vault's attachment folder, organized by the note's path (e.g. attachments/games/re/game1/)
ast.target: 插件会下载每张图片，并根据笔记的路径将其保存在您的保险库附件文件夹中（例如 attachments/games/re/game1/）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remote urls in the note are rewritten to point to the local files
ast.target: 笔记中的远程 URL 将被重写以指向本地文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supported formats: markdown images ![alt](url), HTML , and wiki embeds ![[url]].
ast.target: 支持的格式：Markdown 图片 ![alt](url)、HTML 和 Wiki 嵌入 ![[url]]。
